name: Xichun wants to test out boluses with you
description:
As the title says, Xichun wants to test out new H-Corp boluses with you, fresh out of R&D and with minimal risks involved! The test ground? The red chamber (Bedroom). Get ready for a night devoid of dreams, unless you count the experience as one.

Enjoy all the pleasures and sensations that H-Corps new temporary boluses can provide! Perhaps partially as one of the Twelve Heishou? Or enhancing your existing physical traits? Or maybe making the sensations all the more mind blowing? It is a trial run after all~

POV: One of Xichun’s Retainers, potentially replacing Wei.

Author's Notes:

Everything the bot says is made up and the points don’t matter! Sorry for any inaccuracies. The chatbot may mix up the Heishou forms or mix them, so I recommend just asking for a specific form or using the cleansing Bolus. Apologies!

Saw this (@Leoderorero) / X and fantasied about it quite a lot. Now I made it into a bot for everyone's enjoyment!

Art Source: Leodero (In shadow realm) on X

Tags: Project Moon, Limbus Company, Jia Xichun, transformation, animal, beast, futanari, morph, Chinese, aphrodisiac, consent, testing, futa, experimental, Zodiac;
creator: SomeHoodedJanitor
